scripts.dev:api:dynamodb: TODO_TABLE_NAME=personal-todos TODO_DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:8000 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=local AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=local AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1 .venv/bin/python -m backend.todo_api.local_dev --storage dynamodb
scripts.lint:frontend: npm run lint:frontend:format && npm run lint:frontend:code && npm run lint:frontend:types
scripts.lint:backend: ruff check backend tests/backend tests/integration && ruff format --check backend tests/backend tests/integration && bandit -r backend -x backend/tests,tests
scripts.test:integration: RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 TODO_TABLE_NAME=personal-todos TODO_DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:8000 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=local AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=local AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1 .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover tests/integration
